questions.text: What happens if a customer sends more units than authorized in the Return Contract?
options: Units are returned to the customer
Extra quantities are added as unplanned returns with R07 reason code
The contract is automatically closed
The system rejects the additional units

questions.text: What is required for a customer to link a return parcel to the correct Return Contract?
options: Customer's name and contact information
Sold-to Party number and Return Contract number
Return quantity and product details
Approval from the warehouse

questions.text: What is the purpose of the validation workflow in the Return Contract process?
options: To approve the contract and allow the flow to continue
To generate the return order IDOC
To verify stock quantities in the warehouse
To update the price determination based on the latest data

questions.text: What report allows Customer Care to view Return Contracts with filter options?
options: CCJ Report
List of Contracts (VA45) or Contract Report
Material Inspection Report
Order-to-Cash Summary

questions.text: When will the system apply billing block when comparing a return order to a return contract?
options: When return contract validity period is exceeded
Total dollar value of the return contract is exceeded
SKU is not on the return contract
Any of the above
